response:
Sure! Here's the rewritten version of your query with all personally identifiable information (PII) removed and replaced with generic placeholders, while preserving the original meaning and intent:

---

I hope this message finds you well. I am reaching out because I have found the research areas of your group to be very appealing and in line with my interests. I am therefore very honored and interested in joining your team if there are any available research positions, such as a visiting researcher. I am currently a visiting researcher at a university in Germany, conducting funded research projects on digital health, specifically focusing on digital therapeutic apps for mental health and digital health transformation. I would like to share my short bio with you. I received my Ph.D. in IT Management in 2015 from a university in Malaysia, jointly with a university in the United States. My work has led to over 15 papers in peer-reviewed journals and more than 25 papers in refereed conferences on topics such as IT-business Strategic Alignment, IT flexibility, IT Capabilities, Customer Satisfaction, Information Systems Success, and Communication Effectiveness. My recent interest has led me to research more into the areas of digital transformation and digital health.

--- 

Let me know if you'd like to adjust the tone or style further!
